title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NUEVA ERA BREEDING STATION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NUEVA ERA, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE TO A STOCK FARM AND BREEDING STATION, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1804 / 69 OG No. 7, 1154-36 (February 12, 1973)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6605, October 23, 1972 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE NUEVA ERA BREEDING STATION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NUEVA ERA, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE TO A STOCK FARM AND BREEDING STATION, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Nueva Era Breeding Station in the Municipality of Nueva Era, Province of Ilocos Norte is hereby converted to a stock farm and breeding station, to be known as Nueva Era Stock Farm and Breeding Station.

SEC. 2. The Director of the Bureau of Animal Industry shall issue such rules and regulations which may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3. The sum of two hundred thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the conversion of said breeding station to a stock farm and breeding station.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

GIL J. PUYAT

CORNELIO T. VILLAREAL

President of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Finally passed by the Senate on September 4, 1972

This Act, which origin the House of Representative, was finally passed by the March 14, 1972.

ELISEO M. TENZA

INOCENCIO B. PAREJA

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House Representatives

Approved: October 23, 1972

FERDINAND E. MARCOS

President of the Philippines
